title: Creator Search Insights
html:
TikTok's in-app search-analytics tool — "Google Search Console for TikTok marketers." Surfaces high-volume search queries with insufficient quality content (search-gap arbitrage). Yahir captured the playbook on Sept-12 2025 (2025 09 12 screenshot 2025 09 12 at 8 47 08 pm 1e3caf4c) as the discovery engine to apply against brotein and the aeo agency funnel — same logic as AEO but on TikTok's side of the discovery stack.

#stub
